Title: productConfiguration — Happy Path Two Required Product Sections
Preconditions: Runner-native. PUBLIC role (no auth required for productConfiguration). Uses CFG_LAPTOP (CFG-013) — two required Product sections (RAM, Storage).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=get_config] errors[] empty
[DATA label=get_config] data.productConfiguration.configurationSections is non-null
[COUNT label=get_config] data.productConfiguration.configurationSections.length = 2
[DATA label=get_config] data.productConfiguration.configurationSections.0.type = Product
[DATA label=get_config] data.productConfiguration.configurationSections.0.isRequired = true
[DATA label=get_config] data.productConfiguration.configurationSections.1.type = Product
[DATA label=get_config] data.productConfiguration.configurationSections.1.isRequired = true
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Both sections have non-empty options[] with product references and listPrice (runner-manual)
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; configurationSections null/empty for known configurable product; options[] empty; section.type missing or wrong

Title: productConfiguration — Invalid GUID — Graceful Empty
Preconditions: Runner-native. Zero-GUID configurableProductId. Resolver MUST NOT 500. Either errors[] non-empty with descriptive not-found OR empty configurationSections.
Assertions:

[EVIDENCE] No HTTP 500 in network response
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] If errors[], message is descriptive (not stack trace); response time < 2s (runner-manual)
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; raw stack trace in errors[]; resolver hangs

Title: createConfiguredLineItem — Empty Required Sections Returns Draft (id=null)
Preconditions: Runner-native. CFG_LAPTOP has 2 REQUIRED Product sections. Pass empty configurationSections — backend returns a DRAFT preview with id=null (soft-reject contract: 200 OK, no errors, but the line item is not committable). Verified live 2026-04-27: contract is 'preview is permissive but un-committable when incomplete'; the cart-side BL-CHK-001 enforcement happens at addItem (silent no-op when incomplete; covered separately).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=create_empty] errors[] empty
[DATA label=create_empty] data.createConfiguredLineItem is non-null
[DATA label=create_empty] data.createConfiguredLineItem.id is null
[DATA label=create_empty] data.createConfiguredLineItem.quantity = 1
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] No HTTP 500. id=null indicates soft-reject — line item not committable. BL-CHK-001 cart enforcement is verified separately via addItem-with-empty-config (silent no-op).
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; data.createConfiguredLineItem.id is non-null GUID (would mean stub got committed despite incomplete config — direct BL-CHK-001 violation); errors[] non-empty (would indicate contract drift to hard-reject)
References: xAPI; BL-CHK-001 enforcement at addItem layer

Title: addConfigurationItem (upsert) + configurationItems — Roundtrip
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. addItem(CFG_LAPTOP) WITH both required sections at BASE option, then addConfigurationItem on the RAM section with the UPGRADE option. xAPI contract verified live 2026-04-27: addConfigurationItem is UPSERT by sectionId — replaces the existing option, leaves length at 2. Read-back via configurationItems confirms RAM now points to OPT_RAM_UPGRADE_ID and Storage stays at OPT_STORAGE_BASE_ID.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[COUNT label=add_item] data.addItem.items.0.configurationItems.length = 2
[ERRORS label=add_section] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=read_back] data.configurationItems.configurationItems.length = 2
[DATA label=read_back] data.configurationItems.configurationItems[?sectionId={{SECTION_RAM_ID}}].productId = {{OPT_RAM_UPGRADE_ID}}
[DATA label=read_back] data.configurationItems.configurationItems[?sectionId={{SECTION_STORAGE_ID}}].productId = {{OPT_STORAGE_BASE_ID}}
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] addConfigurationItem upsert behavior verified via sectionId-lookup — same sectionId, swapped productId, length unchanged. Filter syntax insulates against backend response-array ordering shifts (BUG-050i-008 mitigation).
Failure_Signals: read_back length != 2 (would mean append-not-upsert OR section dropped); RAM section's productId is not OPT_RAM_UPGRADE_ID (upsert silently failed); HTTP 500

Title: addConfigurationItems Bulk (upsert) + updateConfigurationItem Replace
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. addItem(CFG_LAPTOP) WITH both required sections at BASE, then addConfigurationItems([RAM=UPGRADE, Storage=UPGRADE]) bulk-upsert, then updateConfigurationItem(RAM=BASE) reverts RAM only. Final state: RAM=BASE (reverted), Storage=UPGRADE. Verifies bulk upsert + single update do not interfere; both share upsert-by-sectionId semantics (verified live 2026-04-27).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=bulk_add] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=update_one] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty

[DATA label=read_back] data.configurationItems.configurationItems[?sectionId={{SECTION_STORAGE_ID}}].productId = {{OPT_STORAGE_UPGRADE_ID}}
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] bulk_add upserted both sections to UPGRADE, then update_one reverted only RAM; Storage stays UPGRADE — confirms bulk and single mutations do not interfere (runner-manual)
Failure_Signals: read_back length != 2; RAM productId is not BASE (update_one didn't take effect); Storage productId is not UPGRADE (bulk silently overwritten); HTTP 500

Title: updateConfigurationItems Bulk Update — Read-back Verified
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. addItem(CFG_LAPTOP) WITH both required sections at BASE, then updateConfigurationItems to swap BOTH to UPGRADE in one round-trip. Read-back via configurationItems verifies both sections now point to UPGRADE productIds (length unchanged at 2).

[DATA label=read_back] data.configurationItems.configurationItems[?sectionId={{SECTION_STORAGE_ID}}].productId = {{OPT_STORAGE_UPGRADE_ID}}
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] bulk_update atomically replaced both sections to UPGRADE in a single round-trip; verified via sectionId-lookup (filter predicate insulates against ordering shifts).

Title: removeConfigurationItem + removeConfigurationItems — Read-back Verified
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. addItem(CFG_LAPTOP) WITH both required sections in the same call (xAPI contract: configurable products require all required configurationSections in addItem; partial config silently no-ops, verified live 2026-04-27). Then removeConfigurationItem(RAM), read-back to verify Storage remains. Then removeConfigurationItems(both, idempotent — RAM already gone), read-back to verify configurationItems empty.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[COUNT label=add_item] data.addItem.items.0.configurationItems.length = 2
[ERRORS label=remove_one] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_after_remove_one] errors[] empty

[ERRORS label=remove_all] errors[] empty

[COUNT label=read_after_remove_all] data.configurationItems.configurationItems.length = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[EVIDENCE] After remove_one, the surviving section is SECTION_STORAGE_ID
[EVIDENCE] removeConfigurationItems with already-removed RAM section is idempotent — no error (runner-manual)
Failure_Signals: remove_one returns success but section persists (length stays 2); remove_all errors when one section already removed (idempotency violation); HTTP 500; addItem returns itemsCount=0 (silent skip) — would indicate xAPI contract change

Title: changeCartConfiguredItem — Atomic Reconfigure With Quantity
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. addItem(CFG_LAPTOP, qty=1) WITH both required sections at BASE. Then changeCartConfiguredItem to set quantity=3 AND replace both sections with UPGRADE options in a single atomic mutation. Read-back verifies quantity=3 + both UPGRADE; extendedPrice exceeds base × qty (price math reflects both option upgrades).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=atomic_change] errors[] empty
[DATA label=atomic_change] data.changeCartConfiguredItem.items.0.quantity = 3
[DATA label=atomic_change] data.changeCartConfiguredItem.items.0.extendedPrice.amount > 0
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=read_back] data.configurationItems.configurationItems.length = 2
[DATA label=read_back] data.configurationItems.configurationItems[?sectionId={{SECTION_RAM_ID}}].productId = {{OPT_RAM_UPGRADE_ID}}
[DATA label=read_back] data.configurationItems.configurationItems[?sectionId={{SECTION_STORAGE_ID}}].productId = {{OPT_STORAGE_UPGRADE_ID}}

Failure_Signals: quantity not updated atomically with config change; config update silently dropped (RAM or Storage stays BASE); HTTP 500; partial update (one of two changes lost); read_back length != 2

Title: changeCartConfigurationItemSelected — Single Flip TRUE→FALSE Triggers Reprice Down
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. CFG_LAPTOP (CFG-013) — two required Product sections (RAM, Storage); both addItem at BASE → both selectedForCheckout=true by default. PR #114: changeCartConfigurationItemSelected flips a single configurationItem's selectedForCheckout; reprice triggered ONLY when flag actually flips (PROPOSED-BL-CART-CFG-001 NCS). Verifies listPrice DECREASES when RAM is deselected because ConfiguredLineItemContainer.UpdatePrice filters out items with SelectedForCheckout=false.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=flip_down] errors[] empty
[DATA label=flip_down] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.configurationItems[?sectionId={{SECTION_RAM_ID}}].selectedForCheckout = false
[DATA label=flip_down] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.configurationItems[?sectionId={{SECTION_STORAGE_ID}}].selectedForCheckout = true
[DATA label=flip_down] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.listPrice.amount < {{BASE_LIST_PRICE}}
[ERRORS label=create_preview] errors[] empty
[DATA label=create_preview] data.createConfiguredLineItem.id is null
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.items.0.listPrice.amount = {{PREVIEW_LIST_PRICE}}
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] listPrice decreased after RAM deselect — confirms ConfiguredLineItemContainer.UpdatePrice filters by SelectedForCheckout (runner-manual; log delta)
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty for valid happy-path flip; listPrice unchanged after real flip (would mean reprice path skipped or filter not applied); selectedForCheckout still true post-flip; HTTP 500
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — Mutation.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected; PR #114 vc-module-x-cart; CFG-013; PROPOSED-BL-CART-CFG-001

Title: changeCartConfigurationItemSelected — Restore FALSE→TRUE Triggers Reprice Up
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. CFG_LAPTOP. addItem with both sections, then flip RAM TRUE→FALSE (capture DEFLATED_LIST_PRICE), then flip RAM FALSE→TRUE. Verifies listPrice INCREASES back to baseline when RAM is re-selected — round-trip pricing parity.
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Round-trip pricing parity: BASE → DEFLATED → BASE; listPrice restored exactly to BASE_LIST_PRICE within float epsilon (runner-manual)
Failure_Signals: listPrice not restored to BASE_LIST_PRICE (reprice on re-select doesn't reverse deflation); selectedForCheckout still false post-flip; errors[] non-empty

Title: changeCartConfigurationItemSelected — NCS Short-Circuit (TRUE→TRUE No Reprice)
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. CFG_LAPTOP. addItem with both sections (default selectedForCheckout=true), capture BASE_LIST_PRICE, then call changeCartConfigurationItemSelected with selectedForCheckout=true on the already-true RAM section. Per PR #114 NCS short-circuit (PROPOSED-BL-CART-CFG-001), no flag actually flipped → no UpdateConfiguredLineItemPrice triggered → listPrice IDENTICAL to BASE_LIST_PRICE. Structured success expected, no error.
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] No-Change Short-Circuit verified: same-value set produces structured success; listPrice byte-identical to BASE_LIST_PRICE — no reprice triggered (runner-manual)
Failure_Signals: listPrice changed despite no actual flag flip (would mean NCS short-circuit broken — per-call repricing); errors[] non-empty for idempotent re-set; HTTP 500
References: xAPI; PR #114 NCS invariant; PROPOSED-BL-CART-CFG-001 (NCS short-circuit)

Per PR #114, the builder hardcodes selectedForCheckout=true server-side; caller passes only configurationSections[]. listPrice MUST increase to baseline.

Failure_Signals: one of two sections remains false (partial batch); listPrice still equals DEFLATED (reprice path skipped); errors[] non-empty; HTTP 500

Failure_Signals: one of two sections remains true (partial batch); listPrice unchanged (filter not applied); errors[] non-empty; HTTP 500

Title: changeCartConfigurationItemSelected — Empty lineItemId Is Soft No-Op
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. Send changeCartConfigurationItemSelected with empty-string lineItemId. Live xAPI contract verified 2026-05-07 (Postman/Newman run cfg-products-2026-05-07): empty lineItemId is treated as a SOFT NO-OP — resolver returns the user's existing cart UNCHANGED, NOT a hard validation error. NonNull String allows empty (NonNull means not-null, not non-empty); resolver short-circuits when no configurationItem matches the (lineItemId, sectionId) lookup. Same contract family as CFG-GQL-022 (unmatched sectionId no-op) and PROPOSED-BL-CART-CFG-001 (NCS short-circuit).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=missing_id] errors[] empty
[DATA label=missing_id] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected is non-null
[DATA label=missing_id] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.id is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] HTTP 200 (NOT 500); cart returned unchanged (no flag flip, no reprice); response time < 2s (runner-manual)
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; raw stack trace in errors; resolver hangs or times out; data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.id null when user has an existing cart (would indicate broken cart-by-context resolution)
References: xAPI; InputChangeCartConfigurationItemSelectedType validation; PR #114; soft-noop contract verified live 2026-05-07

ConfigurationSectionKeyInput for type='Text' OMITS option (matched by sectionId+type only per PR #114 — Text/File use (Type, SectionId) discrimination, not option.productId). Flips Text-section's selectedForCheckout to false; verifies cascade on cart subTotal/total even if Text section contributes zero to listPrice (RecalculateAsync still fires).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.items.0.configurationItems[?sectionId={{SECTION_TEXT_ID}}].selectedForCheckout = true
[ERRORS label=flip_text] errors[] empty
[DATA label=flip_text] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.configurationItems[?sectionId={{SECTION_TEXT_ID}}].selectedForCheckout = false
[DATA label=flip_text] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.listPrice.amount <= {{BASE_LIST_PRICE}}
[DATA label=flip_text] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.extendedPrice.amount = data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.listPrice.amount * data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.quantity
[DATA label=flip_text] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.subTotal.amount = data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.extendedPrice.amount
[ERRORS label=create_preview] errors[] empty
[DATA label=create_preview] data.createConfiguredLineItem.id is null
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.items.0.listPrice.amount = {{PREVIEW_LIST_PRICE}}
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Text section flips successfully without option field — confirms (sectionId, type) discrimination for Text type (PR #114). Cascade verified: extendedPrice = listPrice × quantity; cart subTotal/total reflect any listPrice change atomically (runner-manual)
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty for valid Text-section flip; mutation rejects missing option field (would mean schema requires option for Text type, contradicting PR design); selectedForCheckout still true post-flip; cart subTotal/total don't recalc; HTTP 500
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — Mutation.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected; PR #114 — Text/File discrimination by (Type, SectionId); CFG-024

Title: selectCartConfigurationItems — Mixed-Type Batch (Text + Products) Single Round-Trip + Cascade
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. CFG_TEXT_DRIVEN_COND (CFG-024) — Text root + 2 Product children. addItem with all 3 sections, then unSelectAllCartConfigurationItems (capture DEFLATED state), then selectCartConfigurationItems with a mixed array containing Text (no option) + 2 Product (with option.productId) entries in a single batch. Verifies type discrimination works in batch — Text matched by (sectionId, type), Products matched by (sectionId, type, option.productId).
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Single batch flips Text + 2 Products in one round-trip; type discrimination preserved (Text by (sectionId,type), Product by (sectionId,type,option.productId)); cart subTotal restored to BASE; line-item extendedPrice = listPrice × quantity (runner-manual)
Failure_Signals: one type silently dropped from batch (e.g., Text item not flipped while Products flip — would mean type-specific lookup broken); errors[] non-empty for mixed payload; cart subTotal != BASE post-restore; extendedPrice math wrong
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — Mutation.selectCartConfigurationItems; PR #114 mixed-type batch; CFG-024

Title: changeCartConfigurationItemSelected — listPrice DELTA Equals Option's Effective Price (List/Sale-Aware Reprice)
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. CFG_LAPTOP. Captures the RAM option's effective price from productConfiguration.option.listPrice.amount (and salePrice when present); flips RAM off; asserts (BASE_LIST_PRICE - new_listPrice) EQUALS the captured effective price within float epsilon. Verifies that ConfiguredLineItemContainer.UpdatePrice uses the option's published price source (sale > list when sale exists), not a stale or hardcoded value. Cart subTotal cascades.
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] listPrice DELTA equals captured option's effective price — confirms reprice path uses option's published listPrice/salePrice (not hardcoded). Cascade verified at all 4 levels: lineItem.listPrice → lineItem.extendedPrice → cart.subTotal → cart.total all decrease by RAM_OPTION_PRICE in lockstep (runner-manual)
Failure_Signals: DELTA != RAM_OPTION_PRICE (would mean reprice uses wrong price source — sale/list confusion or stale cache); extendedPrice math broken (listPrice × quantity != extendedPrice); cart subTotal decrease != lineItem.listPrice decrease (would mean cascade broken between lineItem and cart aggregate)
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — Mutation.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected; ConfiguredLineItemContainer.UpdatePrice; PR #114; PROPOSED-BL-CART-CFG-004 (Recalculation Cascade); CFG-013

Title: unSelectCartConfigurationItems — Selective Single-Section Unselect Preserves Other Section's Contribution
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. CFG_LAPTOP with both Product sections at base. unSelectCartConfigurationItems with ONLY RAM in the configurationSections array — Storage MUST remain selectedForCheckout=true. Verifies target-set semantics: only listed sections flip. Cart subTotal decreases by RAM_OPTION_PRICE only.
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Storage's contribution preserved in listPrice — only RAM portion removed. Cascade applies only to the changed delta: cart subTotal drops by RAM_OPTION_PRICE not RAM+STORAGE (runner-manual)
Failure_Signals: Storage flag also flipped to false (would mean batch unselected too much — non-target overflow); listPrice drop ≈ RAM+STORAGE (would mean both options removed); cart subTotal drop != lineItem.listPrice drop (cascade broken)

Title: changeCartConfigurationItemSelected — REQUIRED Product Section Deselect Allowed (No Required-Guard at Mutation Layer)
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. CFG_LAPTOP — both RAM and Storage sections are REQUIRED Product sections. PR #114 mutations only flip flags; they do NOT enforce required-section semantics (BL-CHK-001 enforcement is at addItem/checkout layer, not selection layer). Verifies that deselecting a REQUIRED Product section produces structured success WITHOUT errors, and the flag does flip to false. Cascade still applies — listPrice and cart totals decrease by the option's contribution. Documents the contract: required-section guard is downstream concern (storefront UI gate or createOrderFromCart validation), NOT mutation-level rejection.
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] REQUIRED Product section's selectedForCheckout flag flips to false WITHOUT errors[] — confirms the new selection mutations do NOT enforce required-section semantics at the mutation layer (PR #114 design: required-guard is at downstream layers — storefront UI gate or createOrderFromCart validation). Cascade applies normally (runner-manual)
Failure_Signals: mutation rejects deselection of REQUIRED section with errors[] (would mean unexpected mutation-layer required-guard); selectedForCheckout stays true (silent no-op when required); listPrice unchanged after flag flip; cart subTotal not cascaded
References: xAPI; PR #114 — selection mutation does NOT enforce required-section guard (out of scope per design); BL-CHK-001 deferred to checkout layer; CFG-013

Title: changeCartConfigurationItemSelected — File Section End-to-End: Upload → createConfiguredLineItem Preview → addItem → Flip + Round-Trip + Cascade
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. CFG_FILE_HOODIE (CFG-004) — single optional File section (max 5 files, max 9.5MB each per @td(CFG_FILE_HOODIE.maxFileSizeMb)). Mirrors the real storefront flow: (1) upload @td(UPLOAD_FIXTURES.primary.path) via REST → capture URL; (2) createConfiguredLineItem PREVIEW with File section + uploaded URL → verify preview is committable shape (uncommitted; id=null per CFG-GQL-007 contract) and capture PREVIEW_LIST_PRICE; (3) addItem with the SAME configurationSections payload → verify committed lineItem.listPrice matches preview; (4) flip File-section selectedForCheckout OFF then back ON → round-trip cascade. ConfigurationSectionKeyInput for type='File' OMITS option per PR #114 — File matches by sectionId+type only, identical to Text discrimination.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=rest_upload] HTTP 200
[DATA label=rest_upload] rest_upload.body.[0].succeeded = true
[DATA label=rest_upload] rest_upload.body.[0].errorCode = null OR empty
[DATA label=rest_upload] rest_upload.body.[0].scope = product-configuration
[VAR label=rest_upload] {{UPLOADED_FILE_NAME}} = Logo1.png
[VAR label=rest_upload] {{UPLOADED_FILE_MIME}} = image/png
[ERRORS label=create_preview] errors[] empty
[DATA label=create_preview] data.createConfiguredLineItem is non-null
[DATA label=create_preview] data.createConfiguredLineItem.id is null
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.items.0.listPrice.amount = {{PREVIEW_LIST_PRICE}}
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.items.0.configurationItems[?type=File].selectedForCheckout = true
[ERRORS label=flip_file] errors[] empty
[DATA label=flip_file] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.configurationItems[?type=File].selectedForCheckout = false
[DATA label=flip_file] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.listPrice.amount <= {{BASE_LIST_PRICE}}
[DATA label=flip_file] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.extendedPrice.amount = data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.listPrice.amount * data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.quantity
[ERRORS label=flip_file_back] errors[] empty
[DATA label=flip_file_back] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.configurationItems[?type=File].selectedForCheckout = true
[DATA label=flip_file_back] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.items.0.listPrice.amount = {{BASE_LIST_PRICE}}
[DATA label=flip_file_back] data.changeCartConfigurationItemSelected.subTotal.amount = {{BASE_CART_SUBTOTAL}}
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] File section flips successfully without option field — confirms (sectionId, type) discrimination for File type identical to Text. Round-trip parity: flag flips OFF then back ON; cart subTotal/total restore to BASE values exactly. Cascade verified: extendedPrice = listPrice × quantity at every step; cart subTotal/total recalculate atomically. Uploaded asset stays attached to configurationItem.fileUrls regardless of selectedForCheckout flag (selection mutation does not delete the file association). Cleanup: cleanup_post inline; uploaded asset (UPLOADED_FILE_URL, scope=product-configuration, id=UPLOADED_FILE_ID) intentionally retained — tests are non-destructive on storage. If asset cleanup is needed, runner can DELETE {{BACK_URL}}/api/files/product-configuration/{{UPLOADED_FILE_ID}} (verify endpoint contract before adding)

Title: unSelectAllCartConfigurationItems — All-4-Section-Types Wedding Cake With Conditional Cascade (YOC-85609878)
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. CFG_WEDDING_CAKE_CONDITIONS (YOC-85609878, $79) — richest CFG product: 5 sections covering ALL 4 types with 4-level dependency chain. addItem with all 5 sections, then unSelectAllCartConfigurationItems flips ALL configurationItems to false in single call. Verifies: (a) all-flip operates uniformly across mixed types in one product; (b) selectedForCheckout independent from dependsOnSectionId visibility.
Steps:
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP setup_me]
  query { me { id } }
[GQL-EXEC setup_me]
[GQL-CAPTURE setup_me.data.me.id → USER_ID]
[GQL-OP cleanup_pre]
  mutation { clearCart(command:{ storeId:"{{STORE_ID}}" userId:"{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_pre]
[REST-OP rest_upload]
  POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/files/product-configuration
  Content-Type: multipart/form-data
  Body: file=@@td(UPLOAD_FIXTURES.primary.path) (mimeType: @td(UPLOAD_FIXTURES.primary.mimeType); filename: Logo1.png)
[REST-EXEC rest_upload]
[REST-CAPTURE rest_upload.body.[0].url → UPLOADED_FILE_URL]
[GQL-OP get_def]
  query { productConfiguration(configurableProductId:"@td(CFG_WEDDING_CAKE_CONDITIONS.productId)" storeId:"{{STORE_ID}}") { configurationSections { id name type isRequired dependsOnSectionId options { product { id } } } } }
[GQL-EXEC get_def]
[GQL-CAPTURE get_def.data.productConfiguration.configurationSections[?name=Base].id → SECTION_BASE_ID]
[GQL-CAPTURE get_def.data.productConfiguration.configurationSections[?name=Base].options.0.product.id → OPT_BASE_ID]
[GQL-CAPTURE get_def.data.productConfiguration.configurationSections[?name=Creme].id → SECTION_CREME_ID]
[GQL-CAPTURE get_def.data.productConfiguration.configurationSections[?name=Creme].options.0.product.id → OPT_CREME_ID]
[GQL-CAPTURE get_def.data.productConfiguration.configurationSections[?name=Message].id → SECTION_MESSAGE_ID]
[GQL-CAPTURE get_def.data.productConfiguration.configurationSections[?name=Message].options.0.product.id → OPT_MESSAGE_ID]
[GQL-CAPTURE get_def.data.productConfiguration.configurationSections[?type=Text].id → SECTION_TEXT_ID]
[GQL-CAPTURE get_def.data.productConfiguration.configurationSections[?type=File].id → SECTION_IMAGE_ID]
[GQL-OP create_preview]
[GQL-VARS create_preview] {"configurationSections":[{"sectionId":"{{SECTION_BASE_ID}}","type":"Product","option":{"productId":"{{OPT_BASE_ID}}","quantity":1}},{"sectionId":"{{SECTION_CREME_ID}}","type":"Product","option":{"productId":"{{OPT_CREME_ID}}","quantity":1}},{"sectionId":"{{SECTION_MESSAGE_ID}}","type":"Product","option":{"productId":"{{OPT_MESSAGE_ID}}","quantity":1}},{"sectionId":"{{SECTION_TEXT_ID}}","type":"Text","customText":"Happy Birthday"},{"sectionId":"{{SECTION_IMAGE_ID}}","type":"File","fileUrls":["{{UPLOADED_FILE_URL}}"]}]}
  mutation CreateConfiguredLineItem($configurationSections:[ConfigurationSectionInput]) {
    createConfiguredLineItem(command:{ storeId:"{{STORE_ID}}" currencyCode:"USD" cultureName:"en-US" configurableProductId:"@td(CFG_WEDDING_CAKE_CONDITIONS.productId)" configurationSections:$configurationSections }) { id quantity listPrice{amount currency{code}} extendedPrice{amount} }
  }
[GQL-EXEC create_preview]
[GQL-CAPTURE create_preview.data.createConfiguredLineItem.listPrice.amount → PREVIEW_LIST_PRICE]
[GQL-OP add_item]
[GQL-VARS add_item] {"configurationSections":[{"sectionId":"{{SECTION_BASE_ID}}","type":"Product","option":{"productId":"{{OPT_BASE_ID}}","quantity":1}},{"sectionId":"{{SECTION_CREME_ID}}","type":"Product","option":{"productId":"{{OPT_CREME_ID}}","quantity":1}},{"sectionId":"{{SECTION_MESSAGE_ID}}","type":"Product","option":{"productId":"{{OPT_MESSAGE_ID}}","quantity":1}},{"sectionId":"{{SECTION_TEXT_ID}}","type":"Text","customText":"Happy Birthday"},{"sectionId":"{{SECTION_IMAGE_ID}}","type":"File","fileUrls":["{{UPLOADED_FILE_URL}}"]}]}
  mutation AddItem($configurationSections:[ConfigurationSectionInput]) {
    addItem(command:{ storeId:"{{STORE_ID}}" userId:"{{USER_ID}}" productId:"@td(CFG_WEDDING_CAKE_CONDITIONS.productId)" quantity:1 configurationSections:$configurationSections }) { id itemsCount subTotal{amount} total{amount} items{id quantity listPrice{amount} extendedPrice{amount} configurationItems{id sectionId type selectedForCheckout}} }
  }
[GQL-EXEC add_item]
[GQL-CAPTURE add_item.data.addItem.items.0.id → LINE_ITEM_ID]
[GQL-CAPTURE add_item.data.addItem.items.0.listPrice.amount → BASE_LIST_PRICE]
[GQL-OP unselect_all_mixed]
  mutation { unSelectAllCartConfigurationItems(command:{ storeId:"{{STORE_ID}}" userId:"{{USER_ID}}" lineItemId:"{{LINE_ITEM_ID}}" }) { id subTotal{amount} total{amount} items{id quantity listPrice{amount} extendedPrice{amount} configurationItems{id sectionId type selectedForCheckout}} } }
[GQL-EXEC unselect_all_mixed]
[GQL-OP cleanup_post]
  mutation { clearCart(command:{ storeId:"{{STORE_ID}}" userId:"{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_post]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=add_item] data.addItem.items.0.configurationItems.length = 5
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.items.0.listPrice.amount = {{PREVIEW_LIST_PRICE}}
[ERRORS label=unselect_all_mixed] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=unselect_all_mixed] data.unSelectAllCartConfigurationItems.items.0.configurationItems.length = 5
[COUNT label=unselect_all_mixed] data.unSelectAllCartConfigurationItems.items.0.configurationItems[*?selectedForCheckout=false].length = 5
[COUNT label=unselect_all_mixed] data.unSelectAllCartConfigurationItems.items.0.configurationItems[*?selectedForCheckout=true].length = 0
[DATA label=unselect_all_mixed] data.unSelectAllCartConfigurationItems.items.0.listPrice.amount < {{BASE_LIST_PRICE}}
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Wedding cake exercises ALL 4 section types in single product. unSelectAll flips every type uniformly. Validates selectedForCheckout independent from dependsOnSectionId visibility (runner-manual)
Failure_Signals: one section type silently skipped by all-flip; configurationItems count drops below 5; errors[] non-empty for valid 5-section payload
References: xAPI; PR #114 — all-flip across all 4 types in conditional product; YOC-85609878
